goal: Compare agent harness efficiency under the same user prompt and explicit output success criteria.

same_success_checks: no obvious TypeScript or console-error regression is reported

harness_controlled.description: Compare 续想/ThinkFlow with baseline_agent using the same configured model endpoint when possible.
harness_controlled.primary_question: How much agentic turn fragmentation is removed by streaming predictable tools?

product_comparison.description: Compare 续想/ThinkFlow with external products such as Claude Code using the same prompt and success checks.
product_comparison.primary_question: How does the shipped product behavior compare in end-to-end cost and delivery?
